commands.review_summary:
The PR changes model-call diagnostic stream byte accounting to count incremental delta payloads, adds regression coverage, and documents the bounded `responseStreamBytes` semantics.

PR surface: Source +38, Tests +91, Docs +2. Total +131 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main serializes each stream chunk with `JSON.stringify`, and the PR's regression test gives a focused failure path for `text_delta` chunks whose `partial` snapshot must not be serialized.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Protected maintainer-labeled member PR should stay open for maintainer compatibility acceptance, not automated repair.

target.title: fix(agents): count streamed model deltas incrementally
target.body:
## Summary
- Count streamed `text_delta`/`thinking_delta`/`toolcall_delta` diagnostics from their incremental `delta` bytes instead of serializing the full event.
- Drop growing `partial` snapshots from fallback stream byte accounting so diagnostics do not repeatedly walk the accumulated assistant message.
- Add regression coverage proving text-delta accounting does not serialize large partial snapshots.
- Document the bounded `responseStreamBytes` semantics for high-frequency streamed deltas.

Refs #86599.

## Verification
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `node scripts/docs-list.js`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.model-diagnostic-events.test.ts --reporter=dot` (24 tests passed on `93683b4385b`)
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` (clean, no accepted/actionable findings)
- AWS Crabbox `check:changed`, provider `aws`, lease `cbx_0b76b3240264`, run `run_0fe7fadecd10`: blocked in `typecheck core tests` by existing `src/config/sessions.cache.test.ts` type errors outside this PR's diff after `typecheck core` passed.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: dense model streams no longer make model-call diagnostics serialize the full growing `partial` assistant message on every delta.
Real environment tested: focused local Vitest wrapper in a Codex worktree plus AWS Crabbox changed gate through the core lanes.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.model-diagnostic-events.test.ts --reporter=dot`; `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --target linux --idle-timeout 45m --ttl 90m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`.
Evidence after fix: the regression test passed on `93683b4385b` and asserts that `text_delta` accounting does not call `partial.toJSON`; Crabbox run `run_0fe7fadecd10` reached changed-lane typechecking and failed only in unrelated `src/config/sessions.cache.test.ts` lines not touched by this PR.
Observed result after fix: `responseStreamBytes` is computed from incremental delta bytes for high-frequency stream deltas and from snapshotless chunks for other partial-bearing stream events.
What was not tested: a fully green `pnpm check:changed` on the final SHA; current `origin/main` has unrelated core-test type errors in `src/config/sessions.cache.test.ts` that block the broad gate.
target.author: vincentkoc
